title: Localization Zoo Benchmark
evaluation_policy_note: This snapshot mixes GT-seeded scan-to-map references with odometry-only methods. GT-seeded references use the ground-truth pose as a per-frame initialization and must not be ranked against first-pose-anchored odometry by ATE. The odometry-only CT-ICP and KISS-ICP rows from this 2026-04-02 snapshot are invalidated because they were produced before strict GT/frame association was enforced and require rerun on the same Autoware window.

methods.name: NDT
methods.note: GT-seeded scan-to-map init with weak-update fallback in pcd_dogfooding. Current snapshot uses a recent/local-map profile.

methods.name: GICP
methods.note: GT-seeded scan-to-map init with weak-update fallback in pcd_dogfooding. Current snapshot uses a recent/local-map profile.

methods.name: LiTAMIN2
methods.note: GT-seeded scan-to-map init with weak-update fallback in pcd_dogfooding. Current snapshot uses a recent/local-map profile plus OpenMP parallelism with half-hardware-thread default.

methods.name: CT-ICP
methods.invalidation_reason: Produced before strict GT/frame association was enforced; requires rerun on the same Autoware window.
methods.note: Invalidated odometry-only row. The previous 75.075 m ATE is retained only for audit and must not be ranked until rerun with strict association on the same Autoware window.

methods.name: KISS-ICP
methods.invalidation_reason: Produced before strict GT/frame association was enforced; requires rerun on the same Autoware window.
methods.note: Invalidated odometry-only row. The previous 183.178 m ATE is retained only for audit and must not be ranked until rerun with strict association on the same Autoware window.

methods.name: CT-LIO
methods.note: The source bag window does not include IMU data, so imu.csv was not generated.
